minting_now.name: Fuggliez
minting_now.description:
Deep beneath Ape City, the Based Ape Gang discovered some strange, feral creatures moving through the sewers.  It appeared they were feeding on discarded tech, failed experiments, and forgotten code. These creatures became known as Fuggliez.

What started as a curiosity quickly turned into obsession

minting_now.name: Voxel Voyagers
minting_now.description: WelcomA unique pixel art collective exploring the final frontier through the lens of detailed voxel geometry. This collection features highly stylized, isometric and front-facing portraits of astronaut helmets, where every block, shadow, and reflection is meticulously handcrafted and rendered.

minting_now.name: Based Undeads

minting_now.name: BOY:SCAR
minting_now.description:
BOY:SCAR is a collection of cool, scar-marked boys—each one carrying a unique identity shaped by mystery, experience, and hidden power.
Every scar tells a different story. Some were earned, some were given, and some… are still awakening.
